NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONTINUED TO JANUARY 27, 2010. DEFENDANT TO POST REQUIRED BOND BY JANUARY 22, 2010. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2010 Vacated

Notice And Motion To Dismiss Deft/Appellant'S Appeal Of The Oda Issued By The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment On The Oda
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT MARY ARNOLD Motion To Dismiss Defendant/Appellant's Appeal of The ODA Issued By The Labor Commissioner or in The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain and For Entry Of Judgment on The ODA. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot. Defendant posted bond for $11,670.00 in compliance with Labor section 98.2. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice And Motion To Dismiss Deft/Appellant'S Appeal Of The Oda Issued By The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain And For Entry Of Judgment On The Oda
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Continued To Jan-27-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT MARY ARNOLD Motion To Dismiss Defendant/Appellant's Appeal Of The ODA Issued By The Labor Commissioner Or In The Alternative For An Order To Post Bond By Date Certain and For Entry Of Judgment On The ODA. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to January 27, 2010. Defendant to post required bond by January 22, 2010. If bond is not posted by that time Court will dismiss action per Labor Code section 98.2(b). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
